name: ML Trading Dev Container
postCreateCommand:
sudo -H pip3 install -e . && if [ -d /tmp/host-ssh ] && [ ! -d $HOME/.ssh ]; then cp -r /tmp/host-ssh $HOME/.ssh && chmod 700 $HOME/.ssh && chmod 600 $HOME/.ssh/* 2>/dev/null || true; fi && mkdir -p $HOME/.ssh && if [ -n "${SSH_AUTH_SOCK:-}" ]; then printf 'Host *
    ForwardAgent yes
    IdentityAgent %s
    StrictHostKeyChecking no
' "${SSH_AUTH_SOCK}" > $HOME/.ssh/config; else printf 'Host *
    ForwardAgent yes
    StrictHostKeyChecking no
' > $HOME/.ssh/config; fi && chmod 600 $HOME/.ssh/config && mkdir -p $HOME/.config/fish && if ! grep -q 'fish_add_path ~/.local/bin' $HOME/.config/fish/config.fish 2>/dev/null; then echo 'fish_add_path ~/.local/bin' >> $HOME/.config/fish/config.fish; fi && if ! grep -q '\.local/bin' $HOME/.bashrc 2>/dev/null; then echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> $HOME/.bashrc; fi
